description_long: This is a single-story bungalow set on a long rectangular plot with a large expanse of green lawn extending from the front to the back. The house features a dark gable roof and a prominent front porch supported by columns, with a small set of steps leading up to the entrance. The facade includes a symmetrical arrangement of windows and a central doorway, while the sides of the house have additional windows for natural light. The structure sits on a gray foundation or driveway area, which may serve as a parking space or walkway. The overall design is compact and functional, with a focus on horizontal lines and a low profile. The surrounding lawn suggests a suburban or residential neighborhood context.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, front porch, and large green lawn on a rectangular lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the porch, central entrance, and symmetrical windows with the lawn extending behind.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long stretch of lawn and the house's low, horizontal profile.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the house and the full length of the green lawn visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's side windows and the extended lawn area.
